title: Simunye FC beats Madibaz 2-1 in Easter semi-final clash
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Lawaaikamp’s Simunye Football Club took down NMU Madibaz 2-1 in an exciting first semi-final at the Geolfa Easter Tournament at Thembalethu Stadium.


> Bukho Makhele and Siyabonga Miggels scored the winning goals for Simunye, while Emile Jansen got one back for Madibaz. Pule Masoa stood out with a solid performance for the locals.


In the other semi-final, Fast Eleven FC lost 3-1, paving the way for today’s big final.

Simunye FC will take on Paris United at 15:30 at Thembalethu Stadium, competing for the R25 000 top prize or R11 000 for second place.

Come support our Lawaaikamp boys as they aim for the Easter Tournament title!

Fast Eleven lost their semi-final game 3-1 against Paris United.

Thamsanqa Kebe of Paris United scored the winning third goal against Fast Eleven.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
